calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing And Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Jun-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kaitlyn Murphy, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3867 of the Office of the City Attorney for Respondent San Francisco City and County.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER LEIF ODEN's Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Administrative Mandamus.

Petitioner Oden's petition for writ of administrative and traditional mandamus is denied.(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
